en: TO THE CHOIRMASTER. A PSALM OF DAVID. Deliver me, O LORD, from evil men; preserve me from violent men,
zh: 耶和華啊！求你拯救我脫離惡人， 求你保護我脫離強暴的人。

en: who plan evil things in their heart and stir up wars continually.
zh: 他們心中圖謀惡事， 整天挑啟爭端。

en: They make their tongue sharp as a serpent's, and under their lips is the venom of asps. Selah
zh: 他們使自己的舌頭尖利，如同蛇的舌頭； 他們嘴裡有虺蛇的毒。

en: Guard me, O LORD, from the hands of the wicked; preserve me from violent men, who have planned to trip up my feet.
zh: 耶和華啊！求你保護我脫離惡人的手， 保護我脫離強暴的人， 因為他們圖謀推倒我。

en: The arrogant have hidden a trap for me, and with cords they have spread a net; beside the way they have set snares for me. Selah
zh: 驕傲的人暗中布下陷阱害我， 他們在路旁張開繩索作網， 設下圈套陷害我。

en: I say to the LORD, You are my God; give ear to the voice of my pleas for mercy, O LORD!
zh: 我曾對耶和華說：“你是我的 神； 耶和華啊！求你留心聽我懇求的聲音！”

en: O LORD, my Lord, the strength of my salvation, you have covered my head in the day of battle.
zh: 主耶和華，拯救我的力量啊， 在爭戰的日子，你保護了我的頭。

en: Grant not, O LORD, the desires of the wicked; do not further their evil plot or they will be exalted! Selah
zh: 耶和華啊！求你不要容惡人的心願得償， 不要使他們的計謀成功， 免得他們自高自大。

en: As for the head of those who surround me, let the mischief of their lips overwhelm them!
zh: 至於那些圍困我的人， 願他們的頭被自己嘴唇的奸惡遮蓋。

en: Let burning coals fall upon them! Let them be cast into fire, into miry pits, no more to rise!
zh: 願炭火落在他們身上； 願他們掉在深坑裡， 不能再起來。

en: Let not the slanderer be established in the land; let evil hunt down the violent man speedily!
zh: 願搬弄是非的人在地上站立不住； 願災禍連連獵取強暴的人。

en: I know that the LORD will maintain the cause of the afflicted, and will execute justice for the needy.
zh: 我知道耶和華必為困苦人伸冤， 必替窮乏人辨屈。

en: Surely the righteous shall give thanks to your name; the upright shall dwell in your presence.
zh: 義人必稱讚你的名， 正直的人必住在你面前。
